summary: Increase TAB_H from 4 mm to 5 mm (taller tab/recess zone); re-render all 12 pieces.

scad_changes.description: Bump TAB_H from 4 to 5 mm in the Dimensions block.
scad_changes.search: TAB_H     =  4;     // mm — tab height; lower zone z = 0 … TAB_H
scad_changes.replace: TAB_H     =  5;     // mm — tab height; lower zone z = 0 … TAB_H

scad_changes.description: Update header comment so the z-split description matches the new TAB_H.
scad_changes.search: //  Each piece is z-split at TAB_H = 4 mm:
scad_changes.replace: //  Each piece is z-split at TAB_H = 5 mm:

scad_changes.description: Update SCREW FIT zone arithmetic to reflect TAB_H = 5 mm (receiver body 9.5..5 = 4.5 mm, insert engagement 5..0 = 5 mm).
scad_changes.search:
//    through receiver body (z=9.5..4 = 5.5 mm)  →  insert engagement
//    in donor tab (z=4..0 = 4 mm).  Total shaft = 12 mm. ✓
scad_changes.replace:
//    through receiver body (z=9.5..5 = 4.5 mm)  →  insert engagement
//    in donor tab (z=5..0 = 5 mm).  Total shaft = 12 mm. ✓
